channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: KSE-100 Rebounds Strongly After Historic Single-Day Drop Amid Global Tensions
item.description: Pakistan Stock Exchange witnessed a strong rebound on Tuesday as the KSE-100 index rose by 3,000.76 points, recovering some of the losses from Monday’s unprecedented single-session drop of over 16,000...

item.title: Canada-India Relations Reset Faces Questions on Foreign Interference
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney visited India to mend strained diplomatic relations and promote trade, but a scheduled press conference was cancelled due to time constraints following extended mee...

item.title: Hoppers: A Heartwarming Pixar Tale of Environmental Activism and Animal Adventures
item.description: Pixar’s latest animated feature, Hoppers, tells the story of Mabel, a 19-year-old environmentalist whose consciousness is transferred into a robotic beaver. As she navigates her new four-legged form, ...

item.title: Philadelphia Flyers beat Toronto Maple Leafs 3-2 in shootout, extending Leafs’ losing streak
item.description: The Philadelphia Flyers defeated the Toronto Maple Leafs 3-2 in a shootout on March 2, 2026, at Scotiabank Arena, extending the Leafs’ losing streak to four games. The game saw Noah Cates give the Fly...

item.title: Senator Raffy Tulfo Confirms No Plans to Run for Higher Office, Focuses on Senate Re-election
item.description: Senator Raffy Tulfo clarified in a press conference that he has no intentions of running for president or vice president either now or in the future. He emphasized his desire to remain low-key and foc...

item.title: U.S. Conducts Precision Strikes on Iran, Congress Informed Under War Powers Resolution
item.description: On February 28, 2026, U.S. forces conducted precision strikes against multiple Iranian targets, including ballistic missile sites, air defenses, maritime mining capabilities, and command-and-control c...

item.title: FG Approves Transition for Direct Oil and Gas Payments into Federation Account
item.description: The Federal Government don approve one transition period to make sure say oil and gas contractors go dey pay directly into the Federation Account as per Executive Order 9 issued by President Bola Ahme...

item.title: Chuka Girls High School closed temporarily as investigation on principal proceeds
item.description: Chuka Girls High School in Tharaka Nithi County has been closed indefinitely following protests from parents who demanded the removal of Chief Principal Joan Muchina. Parents accused Muchina of intimi...

item.title: Ntorya-Madimba Gas Pipeline Construction Progresses to Strengthen Tanzania's Power Sector
item.description: The government of Tanzania is pushing forward to meet its goal of producing 8,000 megawatts of electricity by 2030. Key to this plan is the Ntorya-Madimba natural gas pipeline, currently under constru...

item.title: Trump Signals Upcoming US Actions in Iran Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has indicated that Americans will be informed shortly about forthcoming US measures regarding the escalating situation with Iran. He claimed that the United States has al...

item.title: Madlanga Commission considers legal action against Mogotsi as O’Sullivan returns to testify
item.description: The Madlanga Commission is weighing whether to hold North West businessman Brown Mogotsi in contempt after he failed to appear for his scheduled testimony on Monday, citing illness. Chief evidence lea...

item.title: Pakistani Security Forces Neutralise 30 Terrorists in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Operations
item.description: According to a statement issued by the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), Pakistan's security forces successfully carried out multiple intelligence-based operations (IBOs) in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, ...

item.title: Iranian Women's Soccer Team Stands in Silent Protest During Asian Cup National Anthem
item.description: During the opening match of the 2026 AFC Women's Asian Cup at Cbus Super Stadium in Gold Coast, the Iranian women's national soccer team chose not to sing their national anthem, remaining silent as a ...

item.title: FG Starts February Salary Payment and Settles Part of Wage Arrears for Federal Workers
item.description: The Office of the Accountant-General of the Federation (OAGF) don start to pay February 2026 salaries to all Federal Government workers wey dey funded by treasury. This follow after plenty complaints ...

item.title: Anthony Albanese marks three decades in Parliament
item.description: Anthony Albanese has reached a significant milestone, marking 30 years as a member of the Australian Parliament. Over this period, he has been involved in numerous political initiatives, policy debate...

item.title: PNP increases policewomen in barangays to assist VAWC victims
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) is stepping up its efforts to address the rising cases of violence against women and their children (VAWC) by deploying more policewomen in barangays across the co...

item.title: Laikipia North MP Builds Peace and Education Through Amani School
item.description: Sarah Korere, an MP from the marginalised Ndorobo community in Laikipia North, has made significant strides in promoting peace, education, and equity in a region long affected by ethnic clashes, cattl...

item.title: Assessing the 2026 FIFA World Cup Amid Political and Human Rights Concerns
item.description: The 2026 FIFA Men’s World Cup will be the largest in history, hosted across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, with 48 countries participating. While preparations have been...

item.title: Philippines, US, and Japan Conduct Joint Air Patrols in Northern Philippine Waters
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) announced that joint air patrols with the United States and Japan reached as far north as the Bashi Channel, a key waterway separating northern Luzon from Tai...

item.title: Spurs' Luke Kornet Requests Hawks Cancel Strip Club-Themed Promotional Night to Respect Women
item.description: Luke Kornet, center for the San Antonio Spurs and 2024 NBA champion with the Boston Celtics, publicly called on the Atlanta Hawks to cancel their upcoming 'Magic City Night' scheduled for March 16 aga...
